about.title: About
about.description: A real-time dashboard for monitoring water reservoir levels across Puerto Rico, using data from the USGS Water Services API.
about.colorLegendDescription: Colors on the map and table indicate the current alert level of each reservoir:

alertDescriptions.desborde: Reservoir level is above the overflow level. Risk of flooding.
alertDescriptions.seguridad: Level is within the operational safety range.
alertDescriptions.ajustesOperacionales: Adjustments to reservoir operations are required.
alertDescriptions.control: Level is under control within normal parameters.
alertDescriptions.fueraDeServicio: Reservoir is out of service or no data available.
